reference_group.reference: Popova, S.V., Fomicheva, L.N. "Synthesis of tungsten germanides at high pressure". Inorg. Mater. (Engl. Transl.) 1978, 14 (4), 533.

pdf_data.database_comments: ANX: NO2. Analysis: Ge2 W1. Formula From Original Source: Ge2 W. ICSD Collection Code: 638120. ICSD Keywords: Phase diagram. Calculated Pattern Original Remarks: two phase sample. unit cell dimensions given at Ge-rich boundary. Article Title: Synthesis of tungsten germanides at high pressure. Significant Warning: 12%<R factor (for single crystal). Wyckoff Sequence: e a. Unit Cell Data Source: Single Crystal.
